nasb.text: But take care that this liberty of yours does not somehow become a stumbling block to the weak.

esv.text: But take care that this right of yours does not somehow become a stumbling block to the weak.

cnv.text: 然而你們要謹慎，免得你們這自由成了軟弱的人的絆腳石。

ccb.text: 但你们要小心，不要让你们的自由绊倒那些信心软弱的人。

csbs.text: 不过要当心，免得你们的这权利成了软弱之人的绊跌物。
